craft.title: Craft the Monarch Robe via the Philosopher's Stone

arms.title: Forge the Crimson Weapons (the sidearm regalia)

title.text: The Recognition Vessel , the Robe of Divinity

subtitle.text: The King's own raiment, reforged from a Stone.

description: The fifth Vessel. The Monarch armor , a creative-tier set the world will not let you craft by ordinary means.

Only the Philosopher's Stone opens it: the Stone IS the key to the Robe of Divinity. The 3-piece Monarch (chest, legs, boots) worn WITH Iron's Crown is the canonical Unification regalia , 'Sealing Recognition,' Resistance III.
The Crimson Weapons are its sidearms. To wear this is to be seen by the Seal as the Crimson King returned. That is the danger, and the point.
Vessel 5 of 5: Recognition. (Mobility , the Vault Eye , was claimed at the Dragon's table.)
